question: Will the Federal Reserve's 4-week secondary market treasury bill rate have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-06-08?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/DTB4WK once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-06-08 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-05-29) was 4.220. (The latest value released in 4-Week Treasury Bill Secondary Market Rate, Discount Basis from the release H.15 Selected Interest Rates.)
background:
The notes from the release: For questions on the data, please contact the data source: https://www.federalreserve.gov/apps/ContactUs/feedback.aspx?refurl=/releases/h15/% For questions on FRED functionality, please contact: https://fred.stlouisfed.org/contactus/. The notes from the series: data source (https://www.federalreserve.gov/apps/ContactUs/feedback.aspx?refurl=/releases/h15/%). For questions on FRED functionality, please contact us here (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/contactus/).

. Additional background of the series: 1. the units of the series: Percent. 2. the seasonal adjustments of the series: Not Seasonally Adjusted 3. the update frequency: Daily
